title: Qlog Contained CBOR Serialization Work Item
summary: Implement the first contained qlog CBOR serializer boundary over the retained qlog model as a sibling package.
planned_changes: Add a contained-only CBOR serializer boundary in `Incursa.Qlog.Cbor`; expose byte-array and stream-first binary serializer entry points; preserve schema URIs and extension members through the binary mapping; keep the contained qlog file schema URI while selecting `application/cbor` and `.qlog.cbor` as the first local artifact policy; and add requirement-homed verification without coupling the slice to built-in sink adapters.
out_of_scope: Sequential or append-oriented CBOR streaming contracts.
Built-in file or stream sink integration for CBOR output.
HTTP/3 event mapping or new protocol vocabularies.
verification_plan: Run SpecTrace validation, requirement-home coverage for `REQ-QLOG-CBOR`, contained CBOR serializer tests for artifact output and Stream entry points, extension and schema-URI preservation checks against the retained model, and the existing JSON serializer regression coverage.
